title: Analysis of the Role of Tariff Concessions in East Asia

summary.about: Whether East Asian trade agreements’ promised tariff reductions are fully reflected in policy analysis.
summary.audience: Trade negotiators, CGE modelers and regional-integration researchers.
summary.method: Builds an HS6-level tariff-concession extension for GTAP and compares partial with complete implementation of East Asian agreements.
summary.insights: Unimplemented commitments materially affect projected outcomes and should be included in baselines for future trade-policy simulations.
